title: panax quinquefolius var. repens
intro: Panax quinquefolius var. repens, also known as American ginseng, is a type of low-growing, shade-loving plant native to eastern North America. It is a variety of the American ginseng plant, known for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of American ginseng include improved cognitive function, reduced stress and anxiety, and enhanced immune system function. It can be prepared as a tea, capsule, or extract, and is often used in traditional herbal medicine to promote overall well-being.
